query: What is the enterprise SLA uptime guarantee?

request.start.query: What is the enterprise SLA uptime guarantee?

answer: Acme Corp guarantees 99.95% uptime for all API endpoints covered under this SLA, measured on a calendar-month basis. Uptime is calculated as: Uptime % = ((Total Minutes in Month − Downtime Minutes) / Total Minutes in Month) × 100. A month with 43,200 total minutes (30 days) permits a maximum of 21.6 minutes of downtime before the guarantee is breached [enterprise_sla.pdf#chunk-1].
